meaning: adj.可修理的,可改进的,可更正的
examples: The relations among the fuzzy qualified event, the fuzzy unqualified event, the mendable fuzzy unqualified event and the non-mendable fuzzy unqualified event of the parts are analyzed.
We'll confess -- the Segway did a lot of damage to urban mobility as a whole, but General Motors (of all companies) might have just mended a wound we thought un-mendable.
